text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hi! Digitan here! The day of my debut<n>race is
finally here! I can't wait to see<n>all those rookie
Umas looking all<n>nervous!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best not to ruin this<n>precious
occasion for them!
